title: millettia fruticosa
intro: Millettia fruticosa, also known as the climbing wisteria, is a woody climber plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its root, which contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Millettia fruticosa include its use in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions due to its analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects. In traditional herbal preparations, the root of the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
